segments.text: Deliver me, O LORD, from evil men; preserve me from violent men,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: who plan evil things in their heart and stir up wars continually.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They make their tongue sharp as a serpent's, and under their lips is the venom of asps.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Guard me, O LORD, from the hands of the wicked; preserve me from violent men, who have planned to trip up my feet.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The arrogant have hidden a trap for me, and with cords they have spread a net; beside the way they have set snares for me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I say to the LORD, You are my God; give ear to the voice of my pleas for mercy, O LORD!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O LORD, my Lord, the strength of my salvation, you have covered my head in the day of battle.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Grant not, O LORD, the desires of the wicked; do not further their evil plot, or they will be exalted.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: lest…: or, let them not be exalted

segments.text: As for the head of those who surround me, let the mischief of their lips overwhelm them!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let burning coals fall upon them! Let them be cast into fire, into miry pits, no more to rise!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let not the slanderer be established in the earth; let evil hunt down the violent man speedily!
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: an…: or, an evil speaker (Heb. a man of tongue), a wicked man of violence, be established in the earth: let him be hunted to his overthrow

segments.text: I know that the LORD will maintain the cause of the afflicted, and will execute justice for the needy.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Surely the righteous shall give thanks to your name; the upright shall dwell in your presence.
segments.speaker: David
